name: akarelin-skills
description: Personal productivity plugins for Claude Code — file organization, search, session management, and medical document processing.

plugins.name: everything-search
plugins.description: Fast file search using voidtools Everything (1.4/1.5a) via MCP server. Windows only.

plugins.name: organize
plugins.description: File organizer with sub-skills: arxiv paper organizer and medical scan-to-Obsidian processor. Scans folders, identifies files, renames/tags/moves them.

plugins.name: session-manager
plugins.description: Manage Claude Code session folders across repos and hosts — sync, list, resume, rename, and clean up sessions.

plugins.name: skill-manager
plugins.description: Manage and improve Claude Code plugin skills end-to-end: review feedback, patch code, test changes, rebuild and deploy .plugin files.
